flash.title: Thorned Heart
flash.desc: Palm-sized sacred heart wrapped in thorns. Solid black with dotwork shading. Inner arm or calf.

flash.title: Coiled Snake
flash.desc: Whip-shaded serpent coiled around a crescent. Reads beautifully on the forearm or above the knee.

flash.title: Dagger & Rose
flash.desc: Classic pairing, drawn thin. A single-needle rose split by a stiletto dagger. Vertical placements only.

flash.title: Moth No. 3
flash.desc: Small symmetrical moth from the spring sheet. Two hours in the chair, heals crisp. Sternum or nape.

bio: Rae started tattooing in 2017 the way most stubborn people do — hand-poking her own ankle in a college apartment, then apprenticing for two years under a traditional shop in Garden City until the machine felt like a pencil. She went private in 2021: no walk-ins, no five chairs buzzing at once, just one client and one drawing at a time. Blackwork and single-needle fine line are home base; she takes color projects when the idea genuinely needs it. If your concept isn't a fit, she'll say so and point you to someone in the valley who's better for it.

settings.closedNote: Books are closed while Rae works through the current list. The next opening is announced on Instagram first — follow along there, or check back soon.
